'''Dancreti''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of tropical [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] and [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]]. Its [[Standard year/Legends|year]] in [[Local day/Legends|local days]] was 333 [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. It was famous for its small animals called the [[sanl'jek]].

{{Planet-stub}}
